checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-001: Layer Separation

evidence.note: Cross-domain business logic: calls membership.NewProcessor directly from handler (lines 60-61)
Returns server.GetHandler instead of server.InputHandler[CreateRequest]; manually reads body with io.ReadAll (line 49-56)
Returns server.GetHandler; manually reads body instead of using RegisterInputHandler (line 79-93)
Returns server.GetHandler; manually reads body instead of using RegisterInputHandler (line 42-83)

checks.recommendedAction: Refactor membership/preference handlers to use server.RegisterInputHandler[T]. Move membership auto-creation into household processor.

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-002: Immutable Models

evidence.note: Private fields with value-receiver accessors — correct
Private fields with value-receiver accessors — correct
Private fields with value-receiver accessors — correct
Private fields with value-receiver accessors — correct

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-003: Builder Pattern

evidence.note: Missing — no fluent builder or invariant validation

checks.recommendedAction: Add builder.go with fluent API and Build() validation for all four domains

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-004: Provider Pattern

evidence.note: Accepts tenantID parameter and manually filters — should rely on GORM callback
Manually filters by tenant_id in WHERE clause
Manually filters by tenant_id in WHERE clause

checks.recommendedAction: Remove tenantID parameters from providers; rely on automatic GORM tenant callback filtering via db.WithContext(ctx)

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-005: Administrator Pattern

evidence.note: Correct separation — create takes tenantID, update does not

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-006: REST/JSON:API Compliance

evidence.note: Manual JSON:API envelope parsing; uses json.Unmarshal(nil,nil) as error hack
Missing from all domains — inline loops used in handlers

checks.recommendedAction: Eliminate manual envelope parsing by using RegisterInputHandler. Add TransformSlice functions.

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-007: Multi-Tenancy Context

evidence.note: Uses logrus.StandardLogger() instead of d.Logger() — loses request context

checks.recommendedAction: Replace logrus.StandardLogger() with d.Logger() in all handlers

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-008: Testing
checks.recommendedAction: Add database.RegisterTenantCallbacks to all test setupTestDB functions. Add table-driven tests, handler tests, and provider tests.

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-009: Dead Code

evidence.note: Function defined but never called — dead code

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-010: Processor Logger Type
checks.recommendedAction: Change processor logger fields and function parameters to logrus.FieldLogger

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-011: Error Handling in Handlers
checks.recommendedAction: Handle Transform errors — return 500 if transformation fails

checks.markdownSection: 3. Findings by Check ID > ARCH-012: Dockerfile

evidence.note: Go 1.26 does not exist; guidelines specify 1.24+

blockingIssues: ARCH-001: Membership/preference handlers manually parse JSON:API bodies instead of using server.RegisterInputHandler[T]
ARCH-001: Household create handler contains cross-domain business logic (membership creation) in handler layer
ARCH-003: No builder.go in any domain — models can be constructed in invalid states
ARCH-008: Test DBs missing RegisterTenantCallbacks — tenant filtering is untested
nonBlockingIssues: ARCH-004: Providers manually filter by tenant_id where GORM callbacks should handle it
ARCH-007/010: All handlers use logrus.StandardLogger() instead of d.Logger()
ARCH-009: Dead code getByUserID in tenant/provider.go
ARCH-011: Transform errors silently discarded in handlers
ARCH-008: Tests not table-driven; no handler or provider tests

devDocsSeeds.objective: Add builder.go with fluent builders and invariant validation for all 4 domains
Refactor membership/preference handlers to use server.RegisterInputHandler[T]
Move membership auto-creation from household handler to household processor
Add database.RegisterTenantCallbacks to all test setupTestDB functions
Remove manual tenant_id filtering from providers (rely on GORM callbacks)
Replace logrus.StandardLogger() with d.Logger() and change processor logger type to logrus.FieldLogger
Add TransformSlice functions and handle Transform errors
Expand test coverage: table-driven tests, handler tests, provider tests
Fix Dockerfile Go version to valid release
